name: Wayne Wolfe

contactInfo.office: 220 W. Quitman St., Suite 101, Emory, TX 75440

bio: Wayne Wolfe serves as the Rains County Judge, the chief executive and administrative officer of Rains County. The county judge presides over the Commissioners Court and oversees county government operations including budgeting, emergency management, and infrastructure in the Emory area.
campaignPromises: Keep Rains County taxes low while maintaining services
Support law enforcement and public safety
